name: Email
description: Configurable IMAP and SMTP email plugin with secure host-managed credentials, mailbox search, folder browsing, message detail retrieval, mail sending, and side-panel rendering.
author: Lemon Tea

useTools.name: List Mail Folders
useTools.description: List accessible mail folders and unread counts for the configured IMAP account.

useTools.name: Search Mail
useTools.description: Search recent email messages from the configured mailbox with folder, sender, subject, unread, date range, and cursor controls.

mailbox.description: Mailbox folder to search, for example INBOX.

query.description: Keyword to search in sender, subject, or body.

since.description: Only include messages received on or after this ISO datetime.

before.description: Only include messages received on or before this ISO datetime.

unreadOnly.description: When true, only unread mail is returned.

includeBody.description: When true, include the plain-text body in each returned message.

includeHtml.description: When true, include HTML content in each returned message.

cursor.description: Cursor returned by a previous search_mail call for pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

useTools.name: Get Mail Detail
useTools.description: Fetch one email message in detail, including plain text, HTML, headers, and attachment metadata.

mailbox.description: Mailbox folder containing the message, for example INBOX.

uid.description: IMAP UID of the message to retrieve.

useTools.name: Send Mail
useTools.description: Send a real email message through the configured SMTP account with plain text, HTML, multi-recipient fields, and reply headers.

replyToMessageId.description: Optional Message-ID to reference in reply headers.

viewTools.name: Show Mail List
viewTools.description: Render mail search results in the chat side panel.
